quizQuestion:
彼は自分の成功を、良い教育を受けたこと{___}考えた。
(He attributed his success to the good teaching he had received.)
pedagogicalNote: と言うと = speaking of/when you mention; によると = according to; とのこと = according to (reported speech); 旨 = that/concerning; と同様 = in the same way as; 並みに = to the same degree as

quizQuestion:
あれはそんなによかっ{___}？
(Was it that good?)
pedagogicalNote: ~たっけ = was it~/did I recall correctly; ~なかったろう = probably didn't; よくも~ものだ = how dare/how could; のに(wish) = I wish; うちに = while (before it changes)

quizQuestion:
私は列車に乗り遅れた。もっと早く来る{___}だった。
(I missed the train. I should have come earlier.)
pedagogicalNote: べき = should (moral/rational expectation); なければならない = must; せねばならない = must (formal/literary); てはいけない = must not; はず = supposed to be/expected; 予定 = planned/scheduled; 積もりだった = had intended (but didn't)
